changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Retrieval, Archival and Disposal page for Bacteriology Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Manage sample lifecycle closure. Retrieve samples for shipping, retesting, or research with approval workflow. Transfer isolates and DNA to biorepository for long-term archival. Dispose samples using appropriate methods (autoclave, incineration, chemical treatment) with full documentation and supervisor sign-off.

column.name: content
column.value: {"description":"Final stage of sample lifecycle - retrieval, archival, and disposal with full documentation.","sections":[{"id":"sampleRetrieval","title":"Sample Retrieval","fields":[{"name":"retrievalPurpose","type":"dropdown","label":"Retrieval Purpose","required":true,"options":["SHIPPING_REFERENCE_LAB","SHIPPING_COLLABORATOR","RETESTING_CONFIRMATION","RETESTING_INCONCLUSIVE","RESEARCH","QUALITY_ASSURANCE","PROFICIENCY_TESTING","OTHER"]},{"name":"retrievalRequestedBy","type":"text","label":"Requested By"},{"name":"retrievalRequestDate","type":"date","label":"Request Date"},{"name":"retrievalApprovalRequired","type":"checkbox","label":"External/Sensitive - Approval Required"},{"name":"retrievalApprovedBy","type":"text","label":"Approved By"},{"name":"retrievalApprovalDate","type":"date","label":"Approval Date"},{"name":"retrievalDate","type":"date","label":"Retrieval Date"},{"name":"retrievalTime","type":"time","label":"Retrieval Time"},{"name":"retrievedBy","type":"text","label":"Retrieved By"},{"name":"retrievalDestination","type":"text","label":"Destination"},{"name":"retrievalNotes","type":"textarea","label":"Retrieval Notes"}]},{"id":"biorepositoryTransfer","title":"Biorepository Transfer","fields":[{"name":"transferToBiorepository","type":"checkbox","label":"Transfer to Biorepository"},{"name":"biorepositoryName","type":"text","label":"Biorepository Name"},{"name":"transferDate","type":"date","label":"Transfer Date"},{"name":"chainOfCustodyNumber","type":"text","label":"Chain of Custody Number"},{"name":"transferDocuments","type":"multiselect","label":"Documentation Included","options":["SAMPLE_MANIFEST","CHAIN_OF_CUSTODY_FORM","TEST_RESULTS","ISOLATION_RECORDS","IDENTIFICATION_REPORT","AST_RESULTS","MOLECULAR_DATA"]},{"name":"transferConditions","type":"dropdown","label":"Transfer Conditions","options":["DRY_ICE","COLD_PACK","AMBIENT","LIQUID_NITROGEN"]},{"name":"transferredBy","type":"text","label":"Transferred By"},{"name":"receivedBy","type":"text","label":"Received By (Biorepository)"},{"name":"biorepositoryAccessionNumber","type":"text","label":"Biorepository Accession Number"}]},{"id":"disposal","title":"Sample Disposal","fields":[{"name":"disposalCriteria","type":"dropdown","label":"Disposal Criteria","required":true,"options":["EXPIRED","LEAKAGE","MISLABELED","STORAGE_SHORTAGE","EXHAUSTED","CONTAMINATION","BIOHAZARD","STUDY_COMPLETE","OTHER"]},{"name":"disposalMethod","type":"dropdown","label":"Disposal Method","required":true,"options":["AUTOCLAVE","INCINERATION","CHEMICAL_TREATMENT","CERTIFIED_WASTE_DISPOSAL","OTHER"]},{"name":"disposalDate","type":"date","label":"Disposal Date"},{"name":"disposalTime","type":"time","label":"Disposal Time"},{"name":"quantityDisposed","type":"text","label":"Quantity Disposed"},{"name":"disposedBy","type":"text","label":"Disposed By"},{"name":"supervisorSignOff","type":"text","label":"Supervisor Sign-off","required":true},{"name":"biosafetyOfficerSignOff","type":"text","label":"Biosafety Officer Sign-off"},{"name":"disposalCertificateNumber","type":"text","label":"Disposal Certificate Number"},{"name":"disposalNotes","type":"textarea","label":"Disposal Notes"}]},{"id":"archival","title":"Record Archival","fields":[{"name":"archiveRecords","type":"checkbox","label":"Archive Records"},{"name":"archiveLocation","type":"text","label":"Archive Location"},{"name":"retentionPeriodYears","type":"number","label":"Retention Period (Years)","default":5},{"name":"archivedDocuments","type":"multiselect","label":"Archived Documents","options":["RAW_DATA","FINAL_REPORTS","CULTURE_LOGS","AST_RESULTS","MOLECULAR_DATA","QC_RECORDS","AUDIT_TRAIL"]},{"name":"archiveDate","type":"date","label":"Archive Date"},{"name":"archivedBy","type":"text","label":"Archived By"}]}]}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_page_template WHERE id = 207

column.name: description
column.value: Final stage - retrieve samples for shipping/retesting, transfer to biorepository, or dispose with full documentation.

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Manage sample lifecycle closure. Retrieve samples for shipping, retesting, or research with approval workflow. Transfer isolates and DNA to biorepository for long-term archival. Dispose samples using appropriate methods (autoclave, incineration, chemical treatment) with full documentation and supervisor sign-off.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Retrieval, Archival and Disposal - Manage retrieval requests, biorepository transfers, and disposal with documentation
